subtitle: 104 days with the life of the Prophet ﷺ

source.note: The playlist carries episodes 1 to 100. Episodes 101 to 104 (the death of the Prophet ﷺ through the election of Abu Bakr) are taken from Dr. Yasir Qadhi's own channel to complete the arc.

phases.title: The Prologue
phases.blurb: Who he ﷺ is, why we study his life, and the world that awaited him

phases.title: From birth to prophethood
phases.blurb: The lineage, the birth, the childhood, and the man Makkah trusted

phases.title: Revelation in Makkah
phases.blurb: The cave, the call, and the cost of saying it out loud

phases.title: The Night Journey and the Hijrah
phases.blurb: Through the heavens, then out of Makkah

phases.title: Building Madinah
phases.blurb: A mosque, a brotherhood, a constitution, a qiblah

phases.title: Badr
phases.blurb: The first decisive test and the day the ummah stood

phases.title: Uhud and the years of trial
phases.blurb: Loss, slander, and the patience that answered them

phases.title: The Trench and Hudaybiyyah
phases.blurb: The siege of Madinah and the treaty that opened everything

phases.title: Khaybar to the Conquest
phases.blurb: Khaybar, the letters to kings, Mu'tah, and the return to Makkah

phases.title: Hunayn, Tabuk, and the delegations
phases.blurb: The last campaigns and the tribes coming in waves

phases.title: The Farewell
phases.blurb: The Farewell Hajj, the passing of the beloved ﷺ, and the ummah he left behind

note: One episode per day, 104 days. Each entry is retold faithfully in the brand voice from Sheikh Yasir Qadhi's lecture, credited to him, never reproduced verbatim (the same way the Companions pillar retells Omar Suleiman's The Firsts). The Qur'an is grounded via quran.ai, never from memory. Hadith and sira reports follow what the Sheikh narrates, with his caveats about authenticity kept.
